zh.Saint John The Baptist Church, Tolland,: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特托藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Alice Welling於1500年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，她的父親John Welling26歲，母親Emma Jane21歲。她於1516年之前與Thomas Wolcott Sr.在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1556年2月5日在英國薩默塞特享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特托藍德。

zh-hans.Saint John The Baptist Church, Tolland,: 英国英格兰薩默塞特托藍德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Alice Welling于1500年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，她的父亲John Welling26岁，母亲Emma Jane21岁。她于1516年之前与Thomas Wolcott Sr.在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1556年2月5日在英国薩默塞特享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特托藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Welling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Welwyn (Hertfordshire) or Welling in Bexley (Kent), with a suspicion of an alternative unidentified source. The Hertfordshire placename means ‘at the willow trees’, from Old English wel(i)gum, dative plural form of welig ‘willow’. The Kent placename may derive from Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’ + the placename forming suffix -ing. In some cases this name may represent a development of Llewellyn , particularly near the Welsh border.
German: habitational name from any of various places in the Rhineland called Welling or Wellingen.

variants.name: Wellings
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Welling , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Alice Welling was born in 1500, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Welling, was 26 and her mother, Emma Jane, was 21. She married Thomas Wolcott Sr. before 1516, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died on 5 February 1556, in Somerset, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Tolland, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Alice Welling est née en 1500, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Welling, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Emma Jane, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Wolcott Sr. avant 1516, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 février 1556, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Tolland, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Alice Welling 1500 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Welling 26 und ihre Mutter Emma Jane 21. Sie hat vor 1516 in Somerset, England Thomas Wolcott Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb am 5. Februar 1556 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Somerset, England und wurde in Tolland, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Alice Welling è nata il nel 1500 nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Welling, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Emma Jane, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Wolcott Sr. prima del 1516, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 5 febbraio 1556, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Tolland, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Alice Wellingが1500年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父John Wellingは26歳，母Emma Janeは21歳であった。1516年以前にイギリスソメルセトでThomas Wolcott Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1556年2月5日にイギリスソメルセトで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトトランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Alice Welling(이)가 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Welling(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Jane(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1516년 이전 영국 서머세트에서 Thomas Wolcott Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 2월 5일 영국 서머세트에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 톨랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Alice Welling nasceu em 1500, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Welling, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Emma Jane, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Wolcott Sr. antes 1516, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1556, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Alice Welling родилась в 1500 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Welling было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Jane, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Wolcott Sr. перед 1516 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла 5 февраля 1556 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности толланд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Alice Welling nació en 1500, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Welling, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Emma Jane, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas Wolcott Sr. antes de 1516, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1556, en Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
